prompt: Build a local catalog for my vinyl, boxed sets, and ripped music library with album metadata, track lists, storage location, and CSV import-export.
Create a local file index that scans a chosen folder, external drive, or exported NAS listing, stores metadata, supports search, and lets me tag records.
Build a personal trading-card catalog where I can add cards, search them, filter by player or year, and export the collection.
Create a searchable music repertoire catalog for works by title, catalog number, key, instrumentation, and notable recordings.
Build a local catalog for internal modnet modules and external node capabilities where I can browse versions, boundaries, network links, platform targets, and compatibility notes.
Create a media library catalog for records, Blu-rays, boxed sets, game discs, and locally ripped files with searchable metadata and storage locations.
Build a personal book catalog for print books and ebooks with metadata, search, categories, and exportable reading lists.
Create a minimalist quote library where I can save quotations with author, source, page or timestamp, organize them by topic, and search them later.
Build a personal archive of books I have read with review notes, ratings, reading dates, and searchable entries.
Create a local medical-record organizer where I can store dated documents, visit notes, lab summaries, and searchable health history.
Build an archive for recorded audio sessions, live recordings, or digitized media where I can catalog title, source format, track lists, recording date, and storage location.
Create a concert archive where I can catalog shows by date, venue, city, setlist, recording source, and notes.
Build a searchable quotation archive focused on environmental writing with author, source, topic, and personal notes.
Create a personal music shelf organizer module for vinyl, archived discs, and box sets with album details, search, condition notes, and share or export options.
Build a home video archive module for Blu-rays, digitized home videos, capture files, and Plex or Jellyfin entries with title, content notes, storage location, and search.
Create a local contact and records keeper with people, mailing details, household notes, printable labels, and simple search.
Build a movie archive where I can browse theatrical releases, streaming favorites, or personal library entries by year, genre, title, and notes.
Create a sports-card collection catalog with player, team, year, condition, storage location, and exportable reports.
Build a personal music library archive across vinyl, archived discs, digital files, and Plex or Jellyfin collections with notes and filtering by format or genre.
Create an offline storage catalog where I can record what lives on external drives, backup disks, archived SSDs, or NAS snapshots without mounting everything.
Build a local card archive for a tarot deck with searchable entries, imagery, meanings, spreads, and reading notes.
Create a collectibles catalog for a personal doll collection with item details, condition, storage location, acquisition notes, and photos.
Build a media library workspace with sections for albums, films, books, and storage locations plus shared search and a detail pane.
Create a reusable collection-item editor with fields for title, creator, year, format, condition, tags, notes, and cover image.
Build a filter and sort sidebar for a catalog app where I can narrow items by format, genre, year, location, creator, or condition.
Create a storage-location register where I can define shelves, boxes, binders, drives, and bins and assign collection items to them.
Build a tracklist editor for music or audio entries with track order, duration, side or disc grouping, and contributor notes.
Create a quote entry card where I save a quotation, author, source, page or timestamp, topical tags, and personal commentary.
Build a topic-tag manager for a personal archive that suggests consistent tags, merges duplicates, and shows related items.
Create a compact book-review form with rating, reading dates, short review, favorite quotes, and shelf status.
Build a dated document timeline that organizes records by event date, source, and document type with quick preview.
Create an offline backup-volume index where I can register drives, snapshots, archive dates, and the main folders each one contains.
Build a concert-entry form for a show archive with date, venue, city, lineup, setlist, recording links, and notes.
Create an import-mapping helper for collection data where I match CSV columns to fields, preview results, and save reusable mappings.
Build a compact format picker for a catalog app with grouped options like vinyl, archived disc, Blu-ray, ebook, digital file, external drive, and custom entry.
Create a small collection widget for condition, storage location, acquisition date, and quick notes that I can reuse across archive forms.
